chat_coverage.scope: all Claude project dirs resolving to repo basename 'opchain', any checkout path

pricing.basis: current Anthropic list pricing (user-selected over the stale pasted block)

caveats: Chat coverage is repo-scoped: every Claude project dir resolving to this repo's basename is scanned, not just the current container path. Only chats run in this environment are physically present; historical dev chats from another machine/checkout path are not synced into this ephemeral container.
Single transcript present = the live session generating this report; it measures itself up to generation time.
No git tags exist; all entries bucket to 'unreleased'.
Development branch has no PR at report time; per-message and session-dominant PR modes are identical.
All cache writes are 1-hour ephemeral, priced at 2.0x input.
